name: Universus Photo Imagings Limited
summary: Universus Photo Imagings Limited manufactures, sells, and trades in photographic and other imaging products. It offers photographic papers, NTR films, medical X-ray films, etc. The company was formerly known as Jindal Photo Imaging Limited and changed its name to Universus Photo Imagings Limited in December 2019. Universus Photo Imagings Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is based in New Delhi, India.
